prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约 25226→33525→29681→26465→32607，整体波动较大，2022 年因断档大幅后移至 33525，2023–2024 年有所回升，2025 年再次后移至 32607；近 5 年最低位次均值约 29501，2025 年基准约 32607 名；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划 2021–2025 年分别为 395→409→420→423→434，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划大幅增至 505 人，较 2025 年扩招约 16.4%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北农林科技大学为 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 76 名→2026 年第 69 名，排名稳步上升，学校层次在农林类高校中位居前列；2022 年高考周期内该校曾出现学术不端负面事件（教师学术不端受处分），评价为偏负面；2026 年声誉文件中无该校条目，近年无明显重大舆情；抖音热度总排名第 75，评价为“一般”，短视频平台关注度不高；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学 4 个学科获评 A-，均为农林特色学科，与该校招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校以农林类专业为主，相关专业热度一般；河南省 2026 年高考总人数约 120 万，较 2025 年（约 90.7 万）大幅增加约 32%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于陕西咸阳，在河南省招生规模较大（2025 年物理类 434 人），属跨省招生；河南考生对省外 985 高校报考意愿较强，但该校农林类定位在河南考生中热度中等。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 32607、2026 年大幅扩招 16.4%（使位次后移约 3200 名）以及河南省考生总数大幅增加约 32%（使位次前移）等多重因素；考虑考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应，在 supply_demand 基础上小幅前移 200 名，预测 2026 年理科最低位次约 35607 名，区间 35107–36107 名。

- 电气工程及其自动化

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 25226 → 33525 → 29681 → 26465 → 32607, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2022, due to a gap, it dropped sharply to 33525, then rebounded in 2023–2024, and fell again to 32607 in 2025. The average minimum ranking over the past 5 years is about 29501, with the 2025 baseline around 32607. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 395 → 409 → 420 → 423 → 434, gradually expanding slightly each year. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 505 students, an expansion of about 16.4% compared to 2025, which is notable and will help alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest A&F University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it rose from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, showing a steady upward trend. Its level ranks among the top in agricultural and forestry universities. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced a negative incident of academic misconduct (a teacher was punished for academic misconduct), which was evaluated as somewhat negative. In 2026, there is no entry for this university in the reputation file, and there have been no major public incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 75th overall, evaluated as 'average', indicating low attention on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, all of which are characteristic agricultural and forestry disciplines closely related to the university's enrollment majors, providing some support for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronics/Communications, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, but this university mainly focuses on agricultural and forestry majors, which have average popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000), leading to intensified competition. The university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, and has a large enrollment scale in Henan Province (434 students in the physics category in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Henan students have a strong willingness to apply for 985 universities outside the province, but the university's agricultural and forestry positioning has moderate popularity among Henan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 32607, the significant enrollment expansion of 16.4% in 2026 (which shifts the ranking back by about 3200 places), and the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of Henan examinees (which shifts the ranking forward), and taking into account the intensified competition due to the surge in examinee numbers, a slight forward shift of 200 places is applied based on supply_demand. The predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 35607, with a range of 35107–36107.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 35107–36107, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice. Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc.) can be attempted but have a low admission probability, while Tier 3 majors (agricultural and forestry) serve as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 35000), it is advisable to focus on Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 3798→3609→3394→3241→3818, showing an overall forward trend (from 3798 in 2021 to 3241 in 2024), with a slight backward shift to 3818 in 2025; the average minimum ranking over the past 5 years is about 3572, with the 2025 baseline around 3818; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 40→39→30→31→35, rebounding to 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, a slight reduction of about 5.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen to 69th in 2026, indicating a high university level; there was a negative academic misconduct incident in 2022, but no major public opinion issues in recent years; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 75th), with low attention on short video platforms; it has 4 A- disciplines (Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, Grass Science), all in agriculture and forestry, while its liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, International Chinese Education, English, etc.) have low relevance to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended, foreign language majors are average and to be observed; the total number of examinees in Henan Province in 2026 has significantly increased by about 32%, intensifying competition; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Henan is small (30–40 people), with relatively stable cross-provincial enrollment competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3818, a slight enrollment reduction of 5.7% in 2026 (causing a forward shift of about 131 positions), and a significant increase in the total number of examinees in Henan Province (causing a forward shift); considering the intensified competition effect from the surge in examinee numbers, a slight forward shift of 30 positions is applied on top of the supply-demand basis, predicting the 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking to be approximately 3657, with a range of 3157–4157.
